name: AutomationHistory
description: Tracks all automated cards sent through the automation system

automationRuleId.description: Reference to the AutomationRule that triggered this send

clientId.description: Reference to the Client who received the card

triggerType.description: Type of trigger that caused this card to be sent

templateId.description: Reference to the Template used for this card

sentDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the card was sent

scribeBatchId.description: Batch ID returned by Scribe API for tracking fulfillment

status.description: Current status of the automated card send

cardDesign.description: Card design used (e.g., 'Thank you - Plain White')

messageContent.description: Rendered message content sent on the card
